LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Appalachia_Chapter.description: You were part of the Brotherhood's Appalachian expedition, sent to track down rogue members and secure the region's abundant pre-war military installations. The mission went sideways when the Scorched plague decimated your forces.\n\nNow you're the survivors of a failed chapter, carrying the weight of lessons learned the hard way. You've seen what happens when the Brotherhood spreads too thin, when ideology clashes with survival. Time to start fresh, build smart, and maybe do things differently this time.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Appalachia_Chapter.label: Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Appalachia_Chapter.scenario.part:
Appalachia taught you hard lessons. You watched fellow Brothers and Sisters fall to radiation, disease, and creatures that should only exist in nightmares. You saw what happens when the Brotherhood's reach exceeds its grasp.

But you survived. You learned. You adapted.

Now you're far from those irradiated hills, but the lessons remain. Build a chapter that's strong enough to matter, smart enough to survive, and flexible enough to face whatever this world throws at you.

The Brotherhood evolves, or it dies. Time to prove which one you are.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Appalachia_Chapter.scenario.summ: Five Appalachia veterans start with diverse skills but haunted by past failures. Adapt or perish.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_Remnants.description: You are the last survivors of Elder Lyons' reformed Brotherhood - those who believed in protecting the people, not just hoarding technology. After the reunification and return to orthodox doctrine, you were ostracized for your "wasteful" compassion.\n\nFleeing the Capital Wasteland, you seek to establish a new chapter that honors Lyons' vision: a Brotherhood that serves humanity, not just preserves the past. You carry less equipment than a standard Brotherhood deployment, but your ideals remain unshaken.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_Remnants.label: lyon's pride remnants
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_Remnants.scenario.parts.10:
Elder Lyons taught you that technology means nothing if it doesn't serve the people. His daughter Sarah led you into battle not for artifacts, but for lives.

Now the orthodox Brotherhood has reclaimed the Capital Wasteland, and there's no place for "Lyons' sentimentalists" in their ranks. You've fled east, carrying his teachings and the scars of too many hard choices.

Build a new chapter. Prove that the Brotherhood can be a beacon of hope, not just a vault of the past.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_Remnants.scenario.summary: Three Lyon's Pride veterans start with humanitarian ideals but limited Brotherhood resources. Prove that compassion and technology can coexist.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Main_Chapter.description: Your squad was dispatched from Lost Hills to investigate reports of advanced pre-war technology in this region. The vertibird crashed during a storm, scattering your equipment across the wasteland. As knights and scribes of the Brotherhood of Steel, your mission is clear: secure the technology, establish a forward operating base, and bring order to the chaos.\n\nThe Brotherhood's tenets guide you - preserve technology, maintain discipline, and never forget the mistakes of the past.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Main_Chapter.label: Brotherhood of Steel
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Main_Chapter.scenario.parts.14.t:
The vertibird's warning klaxons are still ringing in your ears as you pull yourself from the wreckage. Your mission to investigate pre-war technology sites has taken an unexpected turn.

You are Brotherhood of Steel. Knights, scribes, and initiates bound by the Codex. Your duty is clear: secure technology, establish order, and ensure the mistakes of the Old World are never repeated.

Steel be with you, Brothers and Sisters.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Main_Chapter.scenario.summary: Four Brotherhood of Steel operatives crash-land with minimal supplies. Establish a chapter and fulfill your technological mandate.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Mojave_Chapter.description: You are the survivors of the Hidden Valley bunker, the remnants of a once-proud Brotherhood chapter brought low by Elder Elijah's obsession and the NCR's relentless pressure. After years of isolation and dwindling resources, your bunker has finally been compromised. Scattered and desperate, you've emerged into the wasteland with what little equipment you could salvage. The old Brotherhood doctrine of technological preservation seems like a luxury when survival is uncertain. Can you rebuild the Mojave chapter's strength, or will you fade into the desert like so many others before you?
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Mojave_Chapter.label: Mojave Brotherhood of Steel
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Mojave_Chapter.scenario.parts.12: The Hidden Valley bunker that once sheltered you is now a tomb of metal and failed dreams. Elder Elijah's obsession with the Sierra Madre, the schism with the NCR, years of isolation - it all led to this moment of desperate exodus. You carry what little you could salvage: worn recon armor, a handful of energy weapons, and the bitter knowledge of what the Brotherhood once was. The Mojave sun beats down mercilessly, but it's nothing compared to the weight of rebuilding from ashes. The old ways failed. Perhaps it's time to forge new ones.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Mojave_Chapter.scenario.summary: Four Brotherhood survivors emerge from the ruined Hidden Valley bunker with limited supplies and worn equipment. Rebuild from the ashes of Elijah's legacy.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Outcast_Remnants.description: You are the Outcasts - the true believers who refused to abandon the Codex when Elder Lyons went soft. While he wasted resources protecting wastelanders, you remained dedicated to the Brotherhood's real mission: acquiring and preserving technology.\n\nAfter years of conflict and eventual reunification on unfavorable terms, you've struck out to find a place where the Codex is still law. You start with superior equipment and technical knowledge, but your hardline stance makes diplomacy... challenging.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Outcast_Remnants.label: outcast remnants
The Codex is clear: technology must be preserved, controlled, and kept from those who would misuse it. Elder Lyons betrayed that sacred duty, wasting Brotherhood lives and resources on worthless wastelanders.

You are the Outcasts - the true Brotherhood. While others compromised, you held the line. Now you'll build a chapter that remembers what the Brotherhood was meant to be.

Let the tech-hoarders think you heartless. History will prove you right.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Outcast_Remnants.scenario.summar: Three Outcast operatives with advanced gear but poor social skills. Technology über alles.
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Enclave.description: You are operatives of the Enclave, the shadow government of pre-war America. Armed with advanced technology and an unwavering belief in genetic superiority, you've been tasked with establishing a new outpost to further the Enclave's vision of a pure America. The wasteland is filled with mutants and degenerates - it is your duty to cleanse it.
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Enclave.label: the Enclave
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Enclave.scenario.parts.17.t: Your Enclave team has landed in this remote area to establish a new outpost. With your advanced technology and pure American genetics, you must civilize this wasteland and eliminate the mutant threats that plague the region.\n\nRemember: America's future depends on genetic purity and technological superiority. The Enclave will rise again!
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Enclave.scenario.summary: Enclave operatives establishing a new outpost with advanced technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Lost_Squad.description: Your outpost was attacked by unknown enemies. Your squad was sent off in the dead of night to get reinforcements, but you have now become lost. Will you work your way back to the NCR? Or will you stay where you are and survive as new citizens of this desolate wasteland?
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Lost_Squad.label: lost squad
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Lost_Squad.scenario.parts.9:
The enemy relentless. They came in the night, silent with blades and spears. They cut through the outpost, slashing and killing troopers as if they were killing for fun.

Only you and your squad escaped, having been sent to gather reinfrocements.

After wandering the wastes going in what appears to be circles you find your next spot to make camp. Do you rest for the night, or stay and create a new home for yourselves?
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_Lost_Squad.scenario.summary: Five lost soldiers of the New California Republic attempt to start anew.
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_USA_Lost_Squad.description: Stranded behind enemy lines after a failed operation, your infantry platoon must rely on teamwork and resourcefulness to survive. Cut off from support and surrounded by hostile forces, you must navigate dangerous territory, manage scarce supplies, and find a way to safety.
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_USA_Lost_Squad.label: infantry platoon
LanguageData.FCP_Scenario_USA_Lost_Squad.scenario.par: Stranded behind enemy lines after a failed operation, your infantry platoon must rely on teamwork and resourcefulness to survive. Cut off from support and surrounded by hostile forces, you must navigate dangerous territory, manage scarce supplies, and find a way to safety.
